question: Based on this product revenue chart (as of March 2024), what can we reasonably conclude about the latest year shown?

options.A: Total revenue from all channels has clearly collapsed for the entire latest year compared with previous years.
options.B: We cannot make a reliable statement about the latest year's full-year revenue because the data only cover the early part of the year.
options.C: All channels have permanently lost effectiveness in generating revenue in the latest year.
options.D: Retail is now the only significant contributor to total revenue in the latest year.

explanation: The latest year includes only about 3 months of data, whereas earlier bars represent full-year totals. Stacking the partial-year totals next to full-year bars makes the latest year look dramatically worse across all channels, but this is a consequence of inappropriate aggregation of time, not a true performance collapse.
